DeviceLogicalPort.description: A logical port that resides on a device in the network.

value.description: The DeviceLogicalPort items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

DeviceLogicalPortProperties.description: The properties of a logical port.

provisioningState.description: The status of the last operation on this port.

deviceId.description: The Azure resource ID of the device (e.g., NIC or Switch) this port resides on.

macAddress.description: The MAC address of the port.

nameOnDevice.description: The port's name on the device (e.g., Ethernet 1/1).

linkId.description: The Azure resource ID of the link that the port is interfaced with.

clusterId.description: The Azure resource ID of the cluster that the port is associated with, if any.

DeviceLogicalPortResourceId.description: A type definition that refers the id to an Azure Resource Manager resource.

Link.description: A network link between two devices within a datacenter.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

value.description: The Link items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

provisioningState.description: The status of the last operation on this link

deviceOneId.description: The Azure resource ID of the first device connected via this network link.

deviceLogicalPortOneId.description: The Azure resource ID of the port that this network link is connected to the first device.

deviceTwoId.description: The Azure resource ID of the second device connected via this network link.

deviceLogicalPortTwoId.description: The Azure resource ID of the port that this network link is connected to the second device.

planeId.description: The ID of the plane that this link is associated with.

clusterId.description: The Azure resource ID of the cluster that the rack is associated with, if any.

LinkResourceId.description: A type definition that refers the id to an Azure Resource Manager resource.

MaintenanceRequest.description: A maintenance request on resource(s) that can be requested and approved.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

MaintenanceRequestImpactCategory.description: The types of impact covered by maintenance requests.

values.name: EthLinkMiswire
values.description: The link is miswired between two devices.

values.name: EthLinkUnhealthy
values.description: The referenced link has unspecified performance issues.

values.name: EthNicUnhealthy
values.description: The referenced NIC has unspecified issues.

values.name: EthPortDown
values.description: The referenced port is completely down.

values.name: EthLinkFlap
values.description: The referenced link is flapping.

values.name: EthPortRxLowPower
values.description: The referenced port is receiving low Rx power.

values.name: EthPortTxLowPower
values.description: The referenced port is receiving low Tx power.

values.name: EthPortUnhealthy
values.description: The referenced port has unspecified performance issues, such as packet drops.

values.name: EthSwitchDown
values.description: The referenced switch is completely down.

values.name: EthSwitchUnhealthy
values.description: The referenced switch has unspecified issues, such as a low buffer.

MaintenanceRequestListResult.description: The response of a MaintenanceRequest list operation.

value.description: The MaintenanceRequest items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

MaintenanceRequestProperties.description: The properties of a maintenance request.

description.description: A customizable description of the maintenance request.

provisioningState.description: The status of the last operation on the maintenance request.

maintenanceRequestType.description: The type of the maintenance request

state.description:
The current state of the maintenance request in the encompassing workflow.
Customers can only create a maintenance request with "Investigating" or
"Approved" state, and can only update this from "WaitingForApproval" to "Approved".

unhealthyResources.description: The Azure resource IDs of the entities that are reported to be unhealthy.

impactCategory.description: The impact seen to cause this maintenance request.

repairedResources.description: The Azure resource IDs of the entities that are repaired through this request.

repairCategory.description: The category of repair on the repaired resources.

workloadImpactId.description:
The Azure Resource ID of the workload impact resource,
if created through the Impact RP workflow.

impactedResources.description: The ARM resource IDs of the entities impacted by this maintenance request.

duplicateRequestId.description: The ID of the duplicate maintenance request, if this is a duplicate.

clusterId.description: The cluster that the maintenance request is associated with, if any.

MaintenanceRequestPropertiesUpdate.description: The properties of a maintenance request.

description.description: A customizable description of the maintenance request.

state.description:
The current state of the maintenance request in the encompassing workflow.
Customers can only create a maintenance request with "Investigating" or
"Approved" state, and can only update this from "WaitingForApproval" to "Approved".

MaintenanceRequestRepairCategory.description: The types of repair covered by maintenance requests.

values.name: HumanInvestigate
values.description: The repair needs human investigation.

values.name: OsUpgrade
values.description: The operating system needs to be upgraded.

values.name: PowerCycle
values.description: A power cycle is required.

values.name: Restart
values.description: A restart without power cycle is required.

values.name: RMA
values.description: The repair involves an RMA on a device.

values.name: ReplaceNic
values.description: A NIC needs to be replaced.

values.name: ReplaceCable
values.description: A cable needs to be replaced.

MaintenanceRequestResourceId.description: A type definition that refers the id to an Azure Resource Manager resource.

MaintenanceRequestState.description: The states of the maintenance request

values.name: Created
values.description: The maintenance request has been created.

values.name: Investigating
values.description: The maintenance request is being investigated by Microsoft.

values.name: Duplicate
values.description:
The maintenance request is a duplicate of another maintenance request
that is mentioned in network maintenance ID.

values.name: WaitingOnApproval
values.description: The maintenance request is waiting on customer approval to continue.

values.name: Approved
values.description: The maintenance request is approved by the customer.

values.name: InProgress
values.description: The maintenance request is currently underway.

values.name: Complete
values.description: The maintenance request is complete.

values.name: Cancelled
values.description: The maintenance request is cancelled.

values.name: Investigative
values.description:
It is unknown exactly what the problem is, and Microsoft should investigate
and return with action items.

values.name: Unhealthy
values.description:
It is known what action items should be completed and Microsoft should
only perform that as directed.

MaintenanceRequestUpdate.description: A maintenance request on resource(s) that can be requested and approved.

value.description: The Switch items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

SwitchNetworkType.description: The type of the network the switch resides in.

values.name: BackendScaleUp
values.description: The switch is within a scale-up backend network.

values.name: BackendScaleOut
values.description: The switch is within a scale-out backend network.

values.name: Frontend
values.description: The switch is within a frontend network.

SwitchPacketCaptureMatchRule.description: A match rule to filter packets upon capture.

destinationIpPrefix.description: The allowed destination prefix of the packets to capture.

destinationPort.description: The allowed destination port of the packets to capture.

dscp.description: The differentiated services code point (DSCP) of the packets to match.

protocol.description: The header protocol of the packets to capture.

sourceIpPrefix.description: The allowed source prefix of the packets to capture.

sourcePort.description: The allowed source port of the packets to capture.

tcpFlags.description: The TCP flags of the packets to capture.

SwitchPacketCaptureMatchRuleProtocol.description: The available header protocols for packet captures.

values.name: Ipv4
values.description: Match over IPv4 headers.

values.name: Ipv6
values.description: Match over IPv6 headers.

values.name: Tcp
values.description: Match over TCP headers.

values.name: Udp
values.description: Match over UDP headers.

values.name: Icmp
values.description: Match over ICMP headers.

SwitchPacketCaptureRequest.description: The request body for a packet capture action over a switch.

destinationLocation.description: The location to store captured packets, such as a Storage Account Blob URI.

durationInSeconds.description: The duration of the packet capture in seconds.

interfaces.description: The interfaces over which to capture packets.

matchRules.description: The match rules to apply to the packet capture.

SwitchPacketCaptureResult.description: The result of a packet capture action over a switch.

faultCode.description: The fault code, if the operation failed.

faultMessage.description: The fault message, if the operation failed.

status.description: The status of the packet capture action.

SwitchPacketCaptureResultStatus.description: The status of a packet capture action over a switch.

values.name: Accepted
values.description: The packet capture request has been accepted.

values.name: Running
values.description: The packet capture is still in progress.

values.name: Succeeded
values.description: The packet capture completed successfully.

values.name: Failed
values.description: The packet capture failed.

SwitchPacketCaptureTrafficDirection.description: The traffic directions to filter over when performing packet capture.

values.name: All
values.description: Match all traffic.

values.name: Egress
values.description: Match only egress traffic from the switch.

values.name: Ingress
values.description: Match only ingress traffic to the switch.

provisioningState.description: The status of the last operation on this switch

hardwareSku.description: The SKU of the switch hardware.

networkType.description: The network type of the switch.

clusterId.description: The Azure resource ID of the cluster that the switch is associated with, if any.

rackId.description: The Azure resource ID of the rack that the switch is associated with, if any.

SwitchRetrieveDataOutput.description: The output of a retrieve data action over a switch.

faultCode.description: The fault code, if the operation failed.

faultMessage.description: The fault message, if the operation failed.

path.description: The gNMI path of the read operation.

value.description: The value of the read operation.

SwitchRetrieveDataRequest.description: The request body a retrieve data action over a switch.

paths.description: The gNMI paths of the read operation.

SwitchRetrieveDataResult.description: The result of a retrieve data action over a switch.

value.description: The value of the retrieve data action.
